hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场；【FINANCE】明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息；【FINANCE】沃什在美联储内部寻求最新的顾问任命。

items.title: Why investors may want to prioritize bond markets outside the U.S.
items.summary: Allspring Global Investments is pushing clients toward countries with central banks that are raising interest rates or have different inflation dynamics.
items.title_zh: 为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场
items.summary_zh: Allspring Global Investments 正在将客户推向央行正在加息或通胀动态不同的国家。

items.title: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
items.summary: Kashkari said he sees a hike likely this year as the economy continues to feel the hit from spiking inflation.
items.title_zh: 明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息
items.summary_zh: 卡什卡利表示，由于经济继续受到通胀飙升的打击，他预计今年可能会加息。

items.title: Warsh reaches within the Fed for latest advisory appointments
items.summary: Warsh has added two more key advisors as he seeks to remake how the central bank approaches the economy and monetary policy.
items.title_zh: 沃什在美联储内部寻求最新的顾问任命
items.summary_zh: 沃什又增加了两名重要顾问，试图重塑央行处理经济和货币政策的方式。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: Bitcoin’s quiet $59,000-$60,000 range is starting to look dangerous
items.summary: The token has traded in a tight band near $59,000 to $60,000 all week. The pattern echoes a calm stretch from 2024, but this one is forming below support in a falling market, and a break could open the way toward $40,000.
items.title_zh: 比特币平静的 59,000 美元至 60,000 美元区间开始显得危险
items.summary_zh: 该代币整周的交易价格都在 59,000 美元至 60,000 美元之间。该形态与 2024 年以来的平静走势相呼应，但这一形态正在下跌的市场中形成于支撑位下方，突破后可能会打开通往 40,000 美元的道路。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: Bitcoin nears 2024 lows as options traders pay up for downside protection
items.summary: Bitcoin and ether slid toward key support price levels. DeFi tokens were hit hardest, even as XLM and LIT bucked the broader market weakness.
items.title_zh: 期权交易者为下行保护付出代价，比特币接近 2024 年低点
items.summary_zh: 比特币和以太币跌向关键支撑价格水平。尽管 XLM 和 LIT 顶住了大盘的疲软，但 DeFi 代币受到的打击最为严重。

items.title: Strategy heads for 11th losing month in 12 as bitcoin weakness continues
items.summary: Strategy (MSTR) shares have lost around 41% of their value in June.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币持续疲软，该策略将迎来 12 个月以来的第 11 个月亏损
items.summary_zh: Strategy (MSTR) 的股价在 6 月份下跌了约 41%。

items.title: Bitcoin's correlation with dollar-yen rate hits -0.90, undercutting 'carry trade' theory
items.summary: Bitcoin’s price has shown an unusually strong negative 52-week correlation with the dollar-yen exchange rate.
items.title_zh: 比特币与美元兑日元汇率的相关性达到-0.90，削弱了“套利交易”理论
items.summary_zh: 比特币的价格与美元兑日元汇率呈现出异常强烈的 52 周负相关性。

items.title: TD Cowen slashes Strategy target to $260 on bitcoin outlook, calls new capital framework ‘constructive’
items.summary: TD Cowen cut its Strategy price target to $260 from $400 on a lower bitcoin forecast, while calling its new capital framework "constructive."
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 将比特币前景的战略目标下调至 260 美元，称新的资本框架具有“建设性”
items.summary_zh: 由于比特币预测较低，TD Cowen 将其战略目标价格从 400 美元下调至 260 美元，同时称其新的资本框架是“建设性的”。

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
items.title_zh: GPT-5 如何帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解开 3 年前的谜团
items.summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro 帮助解决了一个长达 3 年的免疫学谜团，提供了对 T 细胞行为的见解。这一突破可以支持癌症和自身免疫研究。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
items.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 将快速加入纳斯达克 100 指数，这将推动巨大的 ETF 购买需求
items.summary_zh: 如此迅速地加入 SpaceX 将使埃隆·马斯克公司成为纳斯达克最近采用的快速纳入框架的首批受益者之一。

items.title: One big win and three defeats for Trump in dramatic day at Supreme Court
items.summary: While Trump celebrated a ruling expanding presidential power to remove and replace regulators, other decisions were major setbacks.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在最高法院戏剧性的一天取得了一场大胜和三场失败
items.summary_zh: 虽然特朗普庆祝扩大总统权力以罢免和更换监管机构的裁决，但其他决定却是重大挫折。

items.title: US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran
items.summary: A series of strikes over the weekend saw the US and Iran accuse each other of violating the ceasefire agreement.
items.title_zh: 美国表示已同意在与伊朗交锋后“退出”
items.summary_zh: 周末发生的一系列袭击事件导致美国和伊朗互相指责对方违反停火协议。

items.title: Australian Man Charged With Homicide After Thai Teen’s Body Found in Suitcase
items.summary: The 17-year-old’s remains were found abandoned near railroad tracks in Pattaya. The suspect was arrested while trying to leave the country.
items.title_zh: 手提箱中发现泰国青少年尸体后，澳大利亚男子被控杀人罪
items.summary_zh: 这名 17 岁男孩的遗体被发现遗弃在芭堤雅的铁轨附近。嫌疑人在试图离开该国时被捕。

items.title: New York Life makes tokenization debut with onchain high-yield bond fund with Centrifuge
items.summary: The $807 billion asset manager is bringing a high-yield corporate bond strategy onto blockchain with Centrifuge as Wall Street expands beyond tokenized Treasury funds.
items.title_zh: 纽约人寿与 Centrifuge 合作推出链上高收益债券基金，首次实现代币化
items.summary_zh: 随着华尔街的业务扩展到代币化国库基金之外，这家价值 8070 亿美元的资产管理公司正在通过 Centrifuge 将高收益公司债券策略引入区块链。

items.title: UK to lower stablecoin capital buffers, undercutting EU's MiCA requirements
items.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority's proposal follows the Bank of England's backtracking on the limit to the value of stablecoins an individual could hold.
items.title_zh: 英国将降低稳定币资本缓冲，削弱欧盟的 MiCA 要求
items.summary_zh: 金融行为监管局的提议是在英格兰银行对个人可以持有的稳定币价值限制进行反悔之后提出的。

items.title: SEC wins $5.5 million default judgment over alleged fake crypto platform NanoBit
items.summary: The group built trust via WhatsApp, then misappropriated user funds to Hong Kong bank accounts instead of executing any actual crypto trades.
items.title_zh: SEC 因涉嫌假冒加密货币平台 NanoBit 获得 550 万美元的缺席判决
items.summary_zh: 该组织通过 WhatsApp 建立了信任，然后将用户资金挪用至香港银行账户，而不是执行任何实际的加密货币交易。

items.title: Live updates: bitcoin falls back below $59,000 as demand dwindles
items.summary: IBIT alone shed $300 million while smaller funds absorbed some of the outflow. The selloff lands as the same AI trade that crashed Korea a week ago now powers a record quarterly rally there.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：随着需求减少，比特币回落至 59,000 美元以下
items.summary_zh: 仅 IBIT 就流失了 3 亿美元，而规模较小的基金吸收了部分资金流出。此次抛售发生的原因是一周前导致韩国崩溃的人工智能交易现在推动了韩国创纪录的季度反弹。

items.title: StarkWare unveils Starknet post-quantum roadmap, calling it crypto’s ‘strongest’ to date
items.summary: StarkWare debuted a three-phase roadmap to make Starknet quantum-ready within months, according to the company.
items.title_zh: StarkWare 公布 Starknet 后量子路线图，称其为加密货币迄今为止“最强”的路线图
items.summary_zh: 据该公司称，StarkWare 推出了一个三阶段路线图，旨在使 Starknet 在几个月内做好量子准备。

items.title: New York Life makes first tokenized move partnering with Centrifuge on high-yield corporate bond strategy
items.summary: The tokenized fund will enable eligible investors to access NYLIM’s established institutional high-yield strategy.
items.title_zh: 纽约人寿首次与 Centrifuge 合作实施代币化高收益公司债券策略
items.summary_zh: 该代币化基金将使合格投资者能够利用 NYLIM 既定的机构高收益策略。

items.title: Hollywood director Carl Rinsch sentenced to 30 months for diverting $11 million in TV production funds to stock options, crypto and luxury purchases
items.summary: "47 Ronin" director Carl Rinsch got 30 months in prison for stealing $11M meant for a Netflix show, spent on crypto and Rolls-Royces.
items.title_zh: 好莱坞导演 Carl Rinsch 因将 1100 万美元电视制作资金用于股票期权、加密货币和奢侈品购买而被判处 30 个月监禁
items.summary_zh: 《47 Ronin》导演 Carl Rinsch 因盗窃 Netflix 节目的 1100 万美元（用于加密货币和劳斯莱斯）而被判入狱 30 个月。

items.title: Benchmark sees over 500% upside in Strategy, reiterates $570 target on new capital framework
items.summary: Benchmark reiterated its Buy rating and $570 target on Strategy, citing its new active two-way capital management framework.
items.title_zh: Benchmark 认为战略有超过 500% 的上涨空间，重申新资本框架的 570 美元目标
items.summary_zh: Benchmark 重申了其买入评级和 Strategy 570 美元的目标，理由是其新的主动双向资本管理框架。

items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

items.summary_zh: 了解 Omio 如何使用 OpenAI 来增强对话式旅行体验、加速产品开发并转型为一家 AI 原生公司。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Polymarket annualized revenue surpasses $1 billion six weeks after its U.S. exchange launch
items.summary: World Cup trading and the end of its U.S. waitlist are driving rapid growth for Polymarket's prediction market platform.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 在美国交易所推出六周后年收入突破 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 世界杯交易及其美国候补名单的结束正在推动 Polymarket 预测市场平台的快速增长。

items.title: Mideast Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Gear Up for Meetings in Qatar
items.summary: American and Iranian officials are in the Gulf state, a key mediator between the two countries, days after new round of attacks threatened efforts to sign a lasting peace deal.
items.title_zh: 中东实时更新：美国和伊朗准备在卡塔尔举行会议
items.summary_zh: 就在新一轮袭击威胁到签署持久和平协议的努力几天后，美国和伊朗官员正在这个海湾国家，两国之间的关键调解人。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
items.summary: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.
items.title_zh: 小盘股上半年表现 35 年来最好。这就是推动它的因素
items.summary_zh: 此次上涨标志着多年来与大盘股相比表现不佳之后的急剧转变。

items.title: China's economy picks up in June on rebounding U.S. exports, analysts say
items.summary: China's economy is showing signs of picking up after a sluggish few months — thanks in part to a rebound in shipments to the U.S.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，美国出口反弹，中国经济六月回升
items.summary_zh: 中国经济在经历了几个月的低迷之后，正显示出复苏的迹象，部分原因是对美国的出口量出现反弹。

items.title: CFTC is conducting an investigation into Polymarket, source says
items.summary: The probe comes after the Commodity Futures Trading Commission and the Department of Justice dropped previous inquiries into Polymarket last July.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，CFTC 正在对 Polymarket 进行调查
items.summary_zh: 此次调查是在商品期货交易委员会和司法部去年 7 月撤销之前对 Polymarket 的调查之后进行的。

items.title: OpenAI is reportedly delaying its IPO. Here's when Kalshi traders think it will announce
items.summary: Speculators think the OpenAI IPO will come early next year, with only one-in-three odds it happens in 2026 but a high likelihood it is done by June 2027.
items.title_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 正在推迟 IPO。这是卡尔什交易员认为会宣布的时间
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为 OpenAI IPO 将于明年初进行，2026 年发生的可能性只有三分之一，但很有可能在 2027 年 6 月完成。

items.title: Jeremy Grantham says, 'This is the most expensive market in American history'
items.summary: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.
items.title_zh: 杰里米格兰瑟姆说：“这是美国历史上最昂贵的市场”
items.summary_zh: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆 (Jeremy Grantham) 表示，围绕人工智能的估值飙升，使美国股市处于历史高位。

items.title: Angry Venezuelans accuse government of negligence over earthquake response
items.summary: People in areas devastated by twin earthquakes say they need more support from the government.
items.title_zh: 愤怒的委内瑞拉人指责政府对地震反应的疏忽
items.summary_zh: 遭受两次地震破坏的地区的人们表示，他们需要政府的更多支持。

items.title: Aftershock frays nerves as many Venezuelans left to fend for themselves
items.summary: In areas devastated by the twin earthquakes, people are using crowbars, pickaxes and their bare hands to try to reach survivors.
items.title_zh: 余震让人紧张，许多委内瑞拉人只能自生自灭
items.summary_zh: 在遭受两次地震破坏的地区，人们使用撬棍、镐和徒手试图接近幸存者。

items.title: Founder of Asian super-app Gojek sentenced to years in jail for corruption
items.summary: The case against Gojek founder Nadiem Makarim relates to a laptop deal made during his term as Indonesia's education minister.
items.title_zh: 亚洲超级应用 Gojek 创始人因腐败被判入狱多年
items.summary_zh: 针对 Gojek 创始人 Nadiem Makarim 的案件与他担任印度尼西亚教育部长期间达成的一项笔记本电脑交易有关。

items.title: Heavy security in South Africa as anti-migrant protesters take to the streets
items.summary: Thousands of people have left South Africa ahead of Tuesday's deadline set by anti-migrant groups.
items.title_zh: 反移民抗议者走上街头，南非戒备森严
items.summary_zh: 数千人在反移民组织规定的周二最后期限之前离开南非。

items.title: Manhunt under way after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and others in Monaco
items.summary: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.
items.title_zh: 摩纳哥乌克兰寡头和其他人因炸弹受伤而展开搜捕
items.summary_zh: 摩纳哥政府首脑表示，爆炸是由似乎含有螺栓和弹丸的爆炸装置引起的。

items.title: Chinese tycoon sentenced to 30 years in US jail
items.summary: Guo Wengui branded himself as a China critic, gaining followers who backed his fraudulent schemes.
items.title_zh: 中国富豪在美国被判30年监禁
items.summary_zh: 郭文贵将自己标榜为中国批评者，赢得了支持其欺诈计划的追随者。

items.title: Flooding hits Ghana's capital killing 13 people - with another storm forecast
items.summary: People have been urged to relocate to high ground or stay indoors as more rain is expected to come.
items.title_zh: 加纳首都遭洪水袭击，造成 13 人死亡 - 预计将再次发生暴风雨
items.summary_zh: 由于预计还会有更多降雨，人们被敦促转移到高地或呆在室内。

items.title: Osaka pays 'love and respect to Japan' in Wimbledon kimono
items.summary: Naomi Osaka has long been renowned for dazzling crowds with her on-court outfits - but making that compatible with Wimbledon's all-white dress code required special inspiration.
items.title_zh: 大阪身穿温布尔登和服向日本表达“爱与尊重”
items.summary_zh: 大阪娜奥米长期以来一直以其场上着装让观众眼花缭乱而闻名，但要使其与温布尔登的全白着装要求兼容需要特殊的灵感。

items.title: Why the True Death Toll of Venezuela’s Quakes Is So Hard to Know
items.summary: Five days after devastating twin earthquakes flattened entire residential neighborhoods, experts fear the official death toll of 1,719 could be a serious undercount.
items.title_zh: 为什么委内瑞拉地震的真实死亡人数如此难以得知
items.summary_zh: 毁灭性的两次地震将整个住宅区夷为平地五天后，专家担心官方公布的 1,719 人死亡人数可能严重低估。

items.title: The Prom Went On in Kyiv, but Masha’s Date Danced Alone
items.summary: Masha Polska, 15, was an avid dancer who had been dreaming of a star turn in the group waltz. That was not to be.
items.title_zh: 舞会在基辅继续进行，但玛莎的约会对象独自跳舞
items.summary_zh: 15 岁的玛莎·波尔斯卡 (Masha Polska) 是一位狂热的舞者，一直梦想着成为集体华尔兹的明星。但事实并非如此。

items.title: Parcel Bomb Explodes in Monaco, Injuring 3
items.summary: The blast seriously injured three people, including a child, according to the authorities, who said the assailant was on the run.
items.title_zh: 摩纳哥包裹炸弹爆炸，造成 3 人受伤
items.summary_zh: 当局称，爆炸造成三人重伤，其中包括一名儿童，袭击者目前在逃。

items.title: Norway’s ‘Viking Row’ Is a Fan Phenomenon at the World Cup
items.summary: Seas of red-clad Norwegian supporters are rowing shoulder to shoulder at stadiums, schools, even a nursing home. Not everyone is thrilled.
items.title_zh: 挪威的“维京行”是世界杯上的球迷现象
items.summary_zh: 身穿红衣的挪威支持者如海在体育场、学校甚至疗养院并肩划船。并不是每个人都感到兴奋。

items.title: What Italy’s Failure to Make the Soccer World Cup Says About Its Wider Woes
items.summary: For some Italians, their team’s absence from the biggest tournament in soccer is a metaphor for a broader national malaise.
items.title_zh: 意大利未能进入足球世界杯说明了其更广泛的困境
items.summary_zh: 对于一些意大利人来说，他们的球队缺席这项最大的足球赛事是一种更广泛的全国性不适的隐喻。

items.title: More Than 1 Million Migrants Apply for Legal Status in Spain
items.summary: Since late April, the Spanish government has allowed undocumented migrants a path out of legal limbo, making Spain a beacon to the global left.
items.title_zh: 超过100万移民在西班牙申请合法身份
items.summary_zh: 自四月下旬以来，西班牙政府允许无证移民摆脱法律困境，使西班牙成为全球左派的灯塔。

items.title: China Increases Military and Economic Pressure on Japan
items.summary: Beijing’s moves have included flying bombers near Japan, detaining businesspeople and restricting the exports of rare earths.
items.title_zh: 中国加大对日本的军事和经济压力
items.summary_zh: 北京的举措包括在日本附近飞行轰炸机、拘留商人以及限制稀土出口。

items.title: Trump Cut a Billion-Dollar Mining Deal. His Sons Stand to Profit.
items.summary: An agreement between the U.S. and Kazakhstan has given a group of American investors with ties to the president and the commerce secretary access to one of the world’s largest untapped reserves of tungsten.
items.title_zh: 特朗普达成了一项价值十亿美元的矿业协议。他的儿子们将从中获利。
items.summary_zh: 美国和哈萨克斯坦之间的一项协议使一群与总统和商务部长有联系的美国投资者能够获得世界上最大的未开发钨储量之一。

items.title: Nasdaq expands distribution of its market data into blockchain infrastructure
items.summary: The exchange operator will offer its TotalView data feed through Pyth's marketplace as financial firms increasingly build applications on blockchain rails.
items.title_zh: 纳斯达克将其市场数据分配范围扩大到区块链基础设施
items.summary_zh: 随着金融公司越来越多地在区块链轨道上构建应用程序，该交易所运营商将通过 Pyth 市场提供 TotalView 数据源。

items.title: Kalshi hit with 14-day restraining order in Michigan, blocking sports prediction markets in state
items.summary: Jurisdiction over prediction market platforms is an ongoing dispute between the CFTC and multiple state regulators.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希在密歇根州受到为期 14 天的限制令，该州的体育预测市场被封锁
items.summary_zh: 对预测市场平台的管辖权是 CFTC 与多个州监管机构之间持续存在的争议。

items.title: Self-exiled Chinese billionaire sentenced to 30 years for fraud involving crypto
items.summary: Guo was arrested in 2023 for orchestrating a more than $1 billion fraud conspiracy involving cryptocurrency.
items.title_zh: 自流亡的中国亿万富翁因加密货币欺诈被判 30 年徒刑
items.summary_zh: 郭于 2023 年因策划涉及加密货币的价值超过 10 亿美元的欺诈阴谋而被捕。

items.title: Securitize to debut on NYSE this Thursday after gaining final nod for merger
items.summary: Securitize announced that shareholders of Cantor have greenlit the business combination, which is expected to close on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 在获得合并最终批准后，证券化将于本周四在纽约证券交易所首次亮相
items.summary_zh: Securitize 宣布 Cantor 的股东已批准此次业务合并，预计将于周三完成。

items.title: Ark Invest loads up on Coinbase, Circle, Bullish, Robinhood shares as stocks rally higher
items.summary: Ark bought $6.85 million worth of Coinbase, $6.21 million worth of Circle Internet Group, and $3.54 million in Bullish on Monday.
items.title_zh: 随着股市走高，Ark Invest 买入 Coinbase、Circle、Bullish、Robinhood 股票
items.summary_zh: 周一，Ark 买入了价值 685 万美元的 Coinbase、价值 621 万美元的 Circle Internet Group 以及价值 354 万美元的 Bullish。

items.title: UK sets capital, market abuse rules in landmark crypto framework
items.summary: The FCA finalized UK crypto rules covering capital, stablecoins and market abuse ahead of Oct. 2027 implementation.
items.title_zh: 英国在具有里程碑意义的加密框架中制定资本和市场滥用规则
items.summary_zh: FCA 在 2027 年 10 月实施之前最终确定了涵盖资本、稳定币和市场滥用的英国加密规则。

items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
items.title_zh: 绘制欧洲人工智能劳动力机会图
items.summary_zh: 一份新的 OpenAI 报告描绘了人工智能如何重塑整个欧盟的就业机会，强调哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
items.title_zh: Daybreak：保护世界上每个组织的工具
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了新的 Daybreak 工具，包括 Codex Security 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​，以帮助组织大规模查找、验证和修补漏洞。

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
items.title_zh: 修补地球：支持开源维护者的黎明计划
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 Patch the Planet，这是一项 Daybreak 计划，可帮助开源维护人员通过人工智能和专家评审来查找、验证和修复漏洞。

items.title: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
items.title_zh: DiScoFormer：一种跨分布的密度和分数转换器

items.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
items.title_zh: 通过一个命令在 HF 作业上运行 vLLM 服务器

items.title_zh: FFASR 排行榜简介：现实世界中的 ASR 基准测试

items.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
items.title_zh: 使用 CUGA 构建真正的代理应用程序：轻量级工具上的两打工作示例

items.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title_zh: 在 Transformers.js 中试验建议的跨域存储 API

items.title_zh: Hushing Face 上的 PP-OCRv6：从 1.5M 到 34.5M 参数的 50 种语言 OCR

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.

items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.summary: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们如何使用 Gemini 构建 Google I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 了解 Google 员工如何利用 AI 打造 Google I/O 2026。

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：探索好奇心驱动的科学如何成为美国成功的重要因素
items.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》展示了美国科学引擎的历史和未来，重点关注麻省理工学院及其他地区有前途的年轻科学家和偶像。

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能代理的速度和能源效率
items.summary_zh: 名为 Murakkab 的新系统优化了支持人工智能应用程序的多步骤工作流程的设计和部署。

items.summary: Leaders, faculty across MIT discuss fostering innovation and talent in Greater Boston in special series of articles published alongside the outlet's annual list of 'Tech Power Players'
